subject: Fw: sounds good..
body:
----- Forwarded Message -----
From: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
To: DKIESQ@aol.com 
Sent: Wednesday, January 10, 2007 7:59 PM
Subject: sounds good..
 



----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, January 10, 2007 6:22:03 PM
Subject: FW: Ayh









Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein


-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, January 10, 2007 4:39 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: FW: Ayh

This space will shortly be available at AYH.  Do you want it for your
construction guys?

-----Original Message-----
From: Kaplan, Daniel
Sent: Wednesday, January 10, 2007 2:32 PM
To: Farkas, Andrew
Subject: Fw: Ayh



----- Original Message -----
From: Morales, David
To: Kaplan, Daniel
Cc: Cole, Jan; Karim, Shahid
Sent: Wed Jan 10 14:25:48 2007
Subject: RE: Ayh

Per Chris, AYH will have one space vacant beginning Feb. 28, 2007.
However, the tenant would like to leave before hand and still pay
through the end date.

It is 885 sq. ft., 2nd floor, end unit space in building A facing the
main road and marina.  AYH's new lease terms are 3 year base at $32/sq.
ft. and one 2yr option.  The rent growth is 5% annual with $4.25 for
CAM.




David Morales

954.302.6016 (office)
954.302.6001 (fax)
917.783.6101 (cell)
dmorales@islecap.com


-----Original Message-----
From: Karim, Shahid
Sent: Wednesday, January 10, 2007 1:35 PM
To: Kaplan, Daniel; Cole, Jan; Morales, David
Subject: Re: Ayh

This question/ request should go to Chris Petty.



----- Original Message -----
From: Kaplan, Daniel
To: Karim, Shahid; Cole, Jan; Morales, David
Sent: Wed Jan 10 13:33:36 2007
Subject: Re: Ayh

So they are not free? Andrew has someone interested in 500 sq feet

----- Original Message -----
From: Karim, Shahid
To: Kaplan, Daniel; Cole, Jan; Morales, David
Sent: Wed Jan 10 13:31:43 2007
Subject: RE: Ayh

Not to each other.  They are potential expansion spaces for existing
tenants (negotiations pending).  Do you need a space plan with relevant
suites identified?


Shahid Karim
Island Global Yachting
515 E. Las Olas Blvd
Suite 900
Fort Lauderdale, FL 33301

954-302-6013 office
954-302-6001 fax

917-287-0413 cell


-----Original Message-----
From: Kaplan, Daniel
Sent: Wednesday, January 10, 2007 1:29 PM
To: Karim, Shahid; Cole, Jan; Morales, David
Subject: Re: Ayh

Contiguous?

----- Original Message -----
From: Karim, Shahid
To: Kaplan, Daniel; Cole, Jan; Morales, David
Sent: Wed Jan 10 13:25:00 2007
Subject: RE: Ayh

I believe there are a couple of vacant suites (both under 300 sf)that
are difficult to lease.  There is a waiting list of potential tenants
for larger spaces.  Property mgr believes he will be fully leased
pending certain transactions that will consolidate these spaces.

David, correct me if I'm wrong.


Shahid Karim
Island Global Yachting
515 E. Las Olas Blvd
Suite 900
Fort Lauderdale, FL 33301

954-302-6013 office
954-302-6001 fax

917-287-0413 cell


-----Original Message-----
From: Kaplan, Daniel
Sent: Wednesday, January 10, 2007 1:21 PM
To: Cole, Jan; Morales, David; Karim, Shahid
Subject: Ayh

Is there vacant office space and if so how much?
--------------------------------------------------------


The information contained in this message and any attachment to it may
be privileged, confidential or otherwise protected from disclosure. If
you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any
dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly
prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please
notify the sender immediately by replying to the message and please
delete it from your system. Please also note that any views or opinions
presented in this email are solely those of the author and do not
necessarily represent those of the company.







____________________________________________________________________________________
